allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: bootstrap PolyTool monorepo with local infrastructure

Create basic project skeleton and local database + dashboard environment
for PolyTool reverse-engineering data storage and visualization.

Infrastructure:
- ClickHouse \(latest\) for analytics storage with polyttool database
- Grafana 11.4.0 with ClickHouse datasource plugin
- Docker Compose for local development

Monorepo structure:
- /docs/ - specifications and feature documentation
- /infra/ - infrastructure configuration \(ClickHouse, Grafana\)
- /services/ - API and worker placeholders
- /packages/ - shared libraries placeholder

Auto-provisioning:
- ClickHouse datasource configured via grafana_ro user \(SELECT only\)
- "PolyTool - Infra Smoke" dashboard with heartbeat panels

Ports: ClickHouse HTTP 18123, Native 19000, Grafana 3000

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(cd "D:\\Coding Projects\\Polymarket\\PolyTool" && python -c "
import json, tempfile
bad = {'schema_version': 'wrong_version', 'metadata': {'user_slug': 'x'}, 'executive_summary': {'bullets': []}, 'hypotheses': []}
f = tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile\(mode='w', suffix='.json', delete=False\)
json.dump\(bad, f\); f.close\(\); print\(f.name\)
" | xargs -I{} python -m polytool llm-save \\
  --user "@testuser" \\
  --model "claude-sonnet-4-6" \\
  --run-id "smoke002" \\
  --report-path "C:\\Users\\patel\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\tmpwoieddu1.md" \\
  --prompt-path "C:\\Users\\patel\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\tmp0tghrxwj.txt" \\
  --hypothesis-path "{}" \\
  --no-devlog 2>&1; echo "exit: $?")

Bash(cd "D:\\Coding Projects\\Polymarket\\PolyTool" && python -c "
import json, tempfile, subprocess, sys
bad = {'schema_version': 'wrong_version', 'metadata': {'user_slug': 'x'}, 'executive_summary': {'bullets': []}, 'hypotheses': []}
f = tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile\(mode='w', suffix='.json', delete=False\)
json.dump\(bad, f\); f.close\(\)

r = subprocess.run\([
  sys.executable, '-m', 'polytool', 'llm-save',
  '--user', '@testuser', '--model', 'claude-sonnet-4-6',
  '--run-id', 'smoke003',
  '--report-path', r'C:\\Users\\patel\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\tmpwoieddu1.md',
  '--prompt-path', r'C:\\Users\\patel\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\tmp0tghrxwj.txt',
  '--hypothesis-path', f.name,
  '--no-devlog',
], capture_output=True, text=True\)
print\('STDOUT:', r.stdout\)
print\('STDERR:', r.stderr\)
print\('exit:', r.returncode\)
" 2>&1)
